order_rule: identity-sorted by record_id; position in this order keys ALL seed streams, the wrong-image derangement (cyclic successor), and fold parity
pilot_overlap_note: records at identity positions previously used by the 500-record pilot and 200-record confirmatory run remain in the pool; their instances are constructed fresh per generator identity; calibration-quarantine (N6.6) applies at split time to every record consumed by any calibration act
